name: Read File
description: Read text files and list directories from the agent's workspace. Workspace-scoped by default; reaching outside requires the filesystem_outside_workspace capability.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read up to `limit` lines of a UTF-8 text file. Returns the file contents as a string with line numbers prefixed. Refuses paths outside the agent workspace unless the agent holds the filesystem_outside_workspace capability.

path.description: Workspace-relative path (preferred) or absolute path. Absolute paths outside the workspace require filesystem_outside_workspace.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read from the start of the file.

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (0-indexed).

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List the entries of a directory (one entry per line). Refuses paths outside the agent workspace unless the agent holds the filesystem_outside_workspace capability. Hidden entries (.dotfiles) are omitted unless `include_hidden` is true.

include_hidden.description: When true, include entries starting with `.`.
